untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom pattern requires identification of at least 2 minor highs and 2 minor lows through swing/pivot analysis. This structural pattern detection cannot be expressed using only point-in-time technical indicators (RSI, MA, ATR, etc.) and simple comparison operators. The allowed indicators lack swing detection, local extrema identification, or peak/valley counting capability. A pattern recognition engine or custom pivot/swing detection function is required.
translation_notes: Signal requires detection of swing structures (minor highs/lows). The entry conditions above are placeholders and cannot accurately represent the signal. Recommend implementing a dedicated broadening bottom pattern detector that identifies local peaks and valleys over a rolling window, counts them, and validates formation geometry (widening bands). Breakout direction is BOTH per parameters.
